reviews.name: Juma K.
reviews.review: The best pilau in Nairobi, hands down. Tastes just like my bibi used to make. The delivery was quick and the food arrived hot. Will be ordering again very soon!

reviews.name: Wanjiru M.
reviews.review: I'm obsessed with the coconut fish curry! It's so rich and flavorful. The chapatis are soft and perfect for dipping. Amaya's is my new go-to for Swahili food.

reviews.name: David O.
reviews.review: Finally, authentic mshikaki that's actually grilled properly. The smokiness is incredible. It's a bit pricey but worth it for the quality. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Aisha B.
reviews.review: Karibu chakula indeed! The hospitality is felt even through their delivery service. The food is always fresh and delicious. A true taste of the coast in Kilimani.

faqs.question: Do you offer catering for events?
faqs.answer: Yes, we do! We offer catering services for corporate events, parties, and family gatherings. Please contact us at least a week in advance to discuss your requirements.

faqs.question: What are your delivery hours and areas?
faqs.answer: We deliver daily from 10:00am to 9:30pm within a 10km radius of our Kilimani kitchen. Delivery fees vary based on location.

faqs.question: Are there vegetarian/vegan options available?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We have a variety of delicious vegetarian and vegan dishes, including our popular coconut bean curry and vegetable samosas. Check our menu for the full list.

faqs.question: How is the food packaged for delivery?
faqs.answer: We use eco-friendly, insulated packaging to ensure your food arrives hot, fresh, and ready to eat, while also being kind to the environment.

faqs.question: Can I make a reservation to dine in?
faqs.answer: Currently, we are a delivery-only kitchen. We do not have a dine-in space. You can enjoy our authentic Swahili cuisine from the comfort of your home or office.
